# hush_twilio_access_privilege (Resource)

Manage Twilio access privileges in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a Twilio access privilege with restricted permissions
resource "hush_twilio_access_privilege" "example" {
  name            = "my-twilio-privilege"
  description     = "Twilio privilege with specific messaging permissions"
  permission_type = "Restricted"
  permissions = [
    "/twilio/messaging/messages/create",
    "/twilio/messaging/messages/read",
    "/twilio/messaging/messages/list",
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the Twilio access privilege
- `permission_type` (String) The permission type (Standard or Restricted)

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the Twilio access privilege
- `permissions` (List of String) The list of Twilio API scope strings (required when permission_type is Restricted)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Twilio access privilege
- `type` (String) The type of access privilege
